query:
SELECT
                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST((detected_at / 3600000) % 24 AS INTEGER) = $2
                                   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hour_count!: i64",
                 COUNT(*) AS "total!: i64"
               FROM detections
               WHERE label_id = $1
                 AND detected_at < $3
                 AND confidence >= $4
